name: Adobong Pusit
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the squids thoroughly.
2. Remove the long thin membrane from the head and slit the eyes to release ink.
3. Place the squids in a saucepan with vinegar, 6 cloves of crushed garlic, salt, and pepper. Cover and cook slowly until the squids are tender.
4. Cut cooked squids into half-inch slices crosswise.
5. Crush remaining garlic and sauté in a little lard in another pan.
6. Add onion and tomatoes and cook until tomatoes are very soft.
7. Add the squids and the liquid in which they were boiled. Simmer for 7 minutes.
8. Season with salt, pepper, and monosodium glutamate (Vet-sin).
